title: Create:Infinite Water
description: A addon mod based on Create, adding a new machine powered by the rotational kinetic network.When the required stress conditions are met, it provides an extractable infinite water source.
body:
# Create: Infinite Water (Create Addon: Infinite Water)

A addon mod based on **Create**, adding a new machine powered by the rotational kinetic network.When the required stress conditions are met, it provides an **extractable infinite water source**.This mod can provide water for almost any other mod, making it perfect for players who want both numerical balance and simplicity.

> Supported Environment: Minecraft **1.21.1** (NeoForge)

> Dependencies: Create / Flywheel / Ponder

***

一个基于 **Create（机械动力）** 的附属模组：新增一台可被动能网络驱动的机器，用于在满足应力条件时提供“可抽取的水源”。这个模组几乎可以给所有的其他模组进行供水，满足了那些既想追求数值上的平衡，又想寻求简洁性的玩家。

> 适用环境：Minecraft **1.21.1**（NeoForge）  
> 依赖：Create / Flywheel / Ponder

***

## Features Overview

### Infinite Water Machine (Infinite Water Block)

*   A stress source is required, and water will only be supplied once the stress threshold is reached.
*   **Stress input direction: Top / Bottom**
*   **Water output direction: All four sides (front, back, left, right) are extractable**
*   Supports Create goggles display (shows running status, threshold requirements, etc.)
*   Includes a Ponder tutorial (demonstrates how to connect and meet the stress threshold)

***

## 功能简介

### 无限水机器（Infinite Water Block）

*   需要应力源提供应力，并且**达到应力阈值后** 才能供水。
*   **应力输入方向：上 / 下**
*   **水输出方向：四侧（前后左右）可抽取**
*   支持 Create 护目镜信息显示（可展示运行状态、阈值等）
*   支持 Ponder 思索教程（演示接入方式与阈值条件）
